description.en: If the underlying element collection contains radio buttons, thevalueproperty represents the checked radio button. On retrieving thevalueproperty, thevalueof the currentlycheckedradio button is returned as a string. If the collection does not contain any radio buttons or none of the radio buttons in the collection is incheckedstate, the empty string is returned. On setting thevalueproperty, the first radio button input element whosevalueproperty is equal to the new value will be set tochecked.
